---
title: "Glossary"
---

| Term | Meaning |
|---|---|
| **Report** | One observed/suspected bloom event. |
| **Event** | The first-class record a report becomes; some events become cases. |
| **Case** | A grouping of related reports for a waterbody (one region, one year). |
| **Response / Advisory** | A staff action; an advisory is the public-facing caution/warning/danger. |
| **Determination / outcome** | What a report turned out to be. |
| **Submission** | A public/community report awaiting staff review (not yet a tracked report). |
| **Promote** | Turn a pending submission into a tracked report. |
| **Provisional data** | Live data from this system, *not* the official data.ca.gov release. |
| **CEDEN** | The state environmental data exchange (lab results format). |
| **Batch** | One ingest of lab data (an email folder, a CEDEN file, or a template) that samples are grouped under. |
| **CoC (chain of custody)** | The form tracking a sample from field to lab; often where a sample's coordinates are recorded. |
| **Sample / result** | A sample is one collected specimen; a result is one analyte value measured on it. |
| **Station** | A sampling location (often a CEDEN station code); geocoded to a point. |
| **Geocode** | Give a sample a map location (from the station registry or coordinates off the CoC). |
| **Reconcile / link** | Connect a lab sample to the event/report/case it belongs to. |
| **Routine sampling** | Monitoring not tied to a bloom report/case; tagged so it leaves the unfinished queue. |
| **Non-detect (ND)** | Analyte tested for but not detected above the method limit. |
| **HUC-12 / GeoConnex** | Watershed coding / persistent identifiers for locations. |
